settings.text.label: Just text
settings.text.desc: The text to display in the bar
settings.fortune.label: Fortune mode
settings.fortune.desc: Show a random quote from fortune instead of custom text
settings.fortuneCategory.label: Category
settings.fortuneCategory.desc: Limit quotes to a specific fortune category (e.g. computers, science)
settings.fortuneMaxLength.label: Max quote length: {value}
settings.fortuneMaxLength.desc: Maximum number of characters a fortune quote may have
settings.fortuneOffensive.label: Include offensive (-o)
settings.fortuneOffensive.desc: Also draw from the offensive fortune database
settings.fortuneEqual.label: Equal probability (-e)
settings.fortuneEqual.desc: Give all categories equal chance regardless of their size
settings.list.label: List mode
settings.list.desc: Show a random entry from a text file instead of custom text
settings.textFile.label: Text file
settings.textFile.desc: Path to a text file with one entry per line. See examples.txt for a starting point.
settings.refreshOnWallpaper.label: Refresh on wallpaper change
settings.refreshOnWallpaper.desc: Pick a new text when the wallpaper changes. Disable to only pick once per session.
